# Dataset Card: <Dataset Name>

<details>
<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Store dataset cards under `docs/data/` or `docs/datasets/` and cross-link from
  `docs/dataset_catalog.md`.
- Include **data_version** that matches the dataset registry or storage tag.
- Note the upstream code or pipeline version that produced the dataset.
- Remove this guidance before publishing.

</details>
